query: Palworld 1.0 player count Steam concurrent sales figures post launch July 2026

{"query":"Palworld 1.0 player count Steam concurrent sales figures post launch July 2026","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1712,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.techpowerup.com/350728/palworld-1-0-update-draws-850-000-players-on-launch-weekend","title":"Palworld 1.0 Update Draws 850,000+ Players on Launch Weekend | TechPowerUp","content":"4 days ago — Palworld 1.0 Update Draws 850,000+ Players on Launch Weekend. SteamDB reporting a whopping 855,459 peak concurrent players on launch weekend. ...
Palworld officially exited Steam Early Access on July 10 with a massive 1.0 update that dropped a host of new game mechanics, new areas, and new pals to collect, raise, train, or put to work.
The 1.0 update, which landed on a Friday two and a half years after its Early Access launch, seems to have been very popular, with SteamDB reporting a whopping 855,459 peak concurrent players on launch weekend.
Steam reviews following the update have also been immensely positive, with July 10 alone seeing a spike of 1,877 new positive reviews on Steam.
Jul 18th, 2026 02:37 CEST change timezone"},{"url":"https://www.pocketpair.jp/en/game-news/over-850000-concurrent-players-on-steam/","title":"Over 850,000 Concurrent Players on Steam! | Pocketpair Inc.","content":"5 days ago — Following the official release of Palworld 1.0, we are thrilled to announce that we have surpassed 850,000 concurrent players on Steam! All ...
We are absolutely blown away to see the Palpagos Islands once again bustling with so many passionate adventurers."},{"url":"https://www.techtimes.com/articles/320243/20260712/palworld-10-hits-near-million-steam-peak-again-discounted-through-july.htm","title":"Palworld 1.0 Hits Near-Million Steam Peak Again, Discounted Through July","content":"The creature-collecting survival game's full 1.0 release — a free upgrade for all existing owners that arrived for most North American players Thursday evening, July 9 — sent the player count surging to 855,525 concurrent users over the launch weekend, a figure only 13 other games in Steam's history have ever reached.
The standard price of $29.99 resumes after the sale ends.
The World Tree, visible from the horizon since the game's January 2024 launch but blocked by an impassable barrier, is now open.
Partner Skills and passive abilities have been overhauled across more than 200 Pals.
The 855,525 peak weekend plays out against a legal backdrop that has considerably narrowed since it began.
Nintendo and The Pokémon Company filed a patent infringement lawsuit against Pocketpair in Tokyo District Court in September 2024, claiming Palworld's creature-capture and riding mechanics infringed several Japanese patents.
The US Patent Office separately rejected all 26 claims in Nintendo's key summoning patent in April 2026.
Patent litigation analyst Florian Mueller of Games Fray has assessed that Nintendo has "zero chance" of prevailing against any current version of the game, and that maximum combined damages — covering Nintendo and The Pokémon Company — amount to approximately $62,000 (¥10 million), applicable only to a narrow window of Japan-market sales before Pocketpair made its changes.
The Wing Pack gear item replaces mount Pals for aerial traversal, freeing all five party slots for combat.
The Tokyo District Court is expected to issue an opinion in November 2026."},{"url":"https://www.forbes.com/sites/paultassi/2026/07/11/both-palworld-and-palworld-10-are-in-steams-best-ever-playercount-list/","title":"Both 'Palworld' And 'Palworld 1.0' Are In Steam's Best-Ever ...","date":"6 days ago","content":"6 days ago — While the game is obviously not going to reach 2.1 million again, it has now hit 725,000 concurrent players on Steam this weekend, with numbers ...Read more"},{"url":"https://www.threads.com/@knoebelnews/post/DanrBCBjBWN/palworld-surpassed-k-concurrent-players-on-steam/","title":"'Palworld' 1.0 surpassed 498K concurrent players on Steam.","date":"8 days ago","content":"8 days ago — The launch of Palworld 1.0 on Steam recorded a peak of 361,334 concurrent players, according to SteamDB data on July 10, 2026.Read more"}]}

tavily.raw: {"query":"Palworld 1.0 player count Steam concurrent sales figures post launch July 2026","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://nichegamer.com/palworld-1-0-draws-hundreds-of-thousands-of-players-back","title":"Palworld 1.0 draws hundreds of thousands of players back - Niche Gamer","content":"# Palworld 1.0 draws hundreds of thousands of players back. by Ivan Katić on July 13, 2026 at 10:31 AM, EDT. Palworld has made a remarkable comeback following the release of its 1.0 update, with the survival game surpassing 850,000 concurrent players on Steam just days after leaving Early Access. Looking at the chart on SteamDB, the game reached a 24-hour peak of 855,525 concurrent players on July 12, placing it among the 15 most-played games in Steam history by peak concurrent users. John “Bucky” Buckley, Pocketpair’s Head of Publishing and Communications, also expressed his surprise at the game’s renewed popularity: *“Obviously, we had high expectations for 1.0 internally, but this is staggering. Despite the strong resurgence, the new milestone still falls well short of Palworld’s record-breaking Early Access debut in 2024. At launch, the game reached 2,101,867 concurrent players, making it the second most-played game in Steam history at the time.","score":0.9407083,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.threads.com/@knoebelnews/post/DanrBCBjBWN/palworld-surpassed-k-concurrent-players-on-steam","title":"'Palworld' 1.0 surpassed 498K concurrent players on Steam.","content":"The launch of Palworld 1.0 on Steam recorded a peak of 361,334 concurrent players, according to SteamDB data on July 10, 2026.","score":0.9356824,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.reddit.com/r/Palworld/comments/1utl5fz/palworld_has_reached_700k_players_on_steam_since","title":"Palworld has reached 700k players on Steam since it's release into 1.0 on July 10th 2026 congratulations Pocket pair and Palworld for the wonderful and amazing game ❤️❤️","content":"Palworld has reached 700k players on Steam since it's release into 1.0 on July 10th 2026 congratulations Pocket pair and Palworld for the wonderful and amazing game ❤️❤️\nr/Palworld - 2582 upvotes, 153 comments\nNone","score":0.8665964,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.techtimes.com/articles/320243/20260712/palworld-10-hits-near-million-steam-peak-again-discounted-through-july.htm","title":"Palworld 1.0 Hits Near-Million Steam Peak Again ...","content":"Palworld 1.0 reached 855525 concurrent Steam players on launch weekend — the second time this creature-collecting survival game has cracked","score":0.8588255,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.videogameschronicle.com/news/palworld-sees-huge-surge-in-concurrent-players-after-the-release-of-version-1-0","title":"Palworld sees huge surge in concurrent players after the release of Version 1.0","content":"# Palworld sees huge surge in concurrent players after the release of Version 1.0. Image 1: Palworld sees huge surge in concurrent players after the release of Version 1.0. Palworld has seen a huge surge in player activity following the full Version 1.0 release of the game. In the month after its Early Access release this figure eventually dropped, and in the two and a half years since then the game has generally logged weekly concurrent peaks of between 25,000 and 50,000 players. This past Friday, however, the game finally left Early Access and got its full Version 1.0 release, which has led to a significantly larger surge of players that hasn’t been since since its first month as an Early Access title. The surge in Palworld players this past weekend (as seen at the end of the graph) is the highest since its first month in Early Access.","score":0.6609831,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":1.51,"request_id":"b49ec6af-8789-4b2b-ab0b-cc7164bc4345"}
